text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists on protocols.io but its full title is "Lightweight Brain Tumor Segmentation on Low-Resource Systems: A Step-by-Step Guide with 3D U-Net," and its actual authors are Ayomide Oladele, Raymond Confidence, Dong Zhang, Charity Umoren, Aondana M Iorumbur, Anu Gbadamosi, Farouk Dako, Maruf Adewole, and Udunna Anazodo — none of whom is "Fatima Adebayo." The cited author is completely absent from the real work, making this a grafted reference with a fabricated author name.
LINK: https://www.protocols.io/view/lightweight-brain-tumor-segmentation-on-low-resour-gz4sbx8wf.html
